comment: If it wasn't broke, don't fix it. The previous UI was an ideal translator app. Very simple to use. I miss the rotate-the-phone and the translated work is enlarged on the screen for the person to read.
key sentence: The key words: rotate-the-phone, previous UI
the function of activity: The activity facilitates translation and navigation:Search, menu, navigate, history, handwriting, options, text entry, paste, language swap, and settings management for user interaction and feedback.
